summary: Documentation-only change to README.md adding the backend-killer workload in two places: the supported-workloads bullet list and the Workload impact table. Both additions satisfy every acceptance criterion in task-03, match neighboring style/format, preserve alphabetical order, and correctly use the CLI flag form (backend-killer) in the bullet and the package name (backendkiller, confirmed as the real Go package) in the table. No other README sections, the disclaimer, or the code example were touched.
